Bash(cd /tmp/xnvse-probe && grep -rin "GetModBonuses\\|CalculateDamage\\|GetDamage\\|weaponDamage\\|GetAttackDamage\\|fHandwaveAmount\\|attackDamage" nvse/nvse/*.h nvse/nvse/*.cpp 2>/dev/null | grep -iv "//\\|comment" | head -30)

Bash(cd /tmp/JIP-LN-NVSE-Library && grep -rin "0x645380\\|GetWeaponDPS\\|CalculatedWeaponDamage\\|GetWeaponDamage\\|0x6453\\|WeaponDPS\\|645380" . 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=== search both repos for 0x645 addresses near damage ==="; grep -rin "0x6452\\|0x6453\\|0x6454" /tmp/JIP-LN-NVSE-Library /tmp/JohnnyGuitarNVSE 2>/dev/null | head)

Bash(cd /tmp && grep -rin "numProjectiles\\|projectileCount\\|nbProjectiles\\|UInt32 numProj" JohnnyGuitarNVSE JIP-LN-NVSE-Library xnvse-probe 2>/dev/null | grep -i "weap\\|proj" | head; echo "=== TESObjectWEAP attackDmg / fields ==="; grep -rn "numProjectiles\\|attackDmg\\|UInt8\\s*numProj\\|projectile" /tmp/xnvse-probe/nvse/nvse/GameForms.h 2>/dev/null | head)
